description: This video discusses the directed Hamiltonian path problem, its NP-hardness, and its reduction from the 3sat problem. It explains the structure of directed graphs and how Hamiltonian paths can be used to represent truth assignments in 3sat instances.
topic_summary: The video covers the directed Hamiltonian path problem, its significance in NP-hardness proofs, and the method of reducing the 3sat problem to this graph problem. It illustrates how to encode truth assignments using Hamiltonian paths in a constructed graph.
